lines.speaker: Silk trader
lines.text: Do you want to buy any fine silks?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No. That's too much for me.

lines.speaker: Silk trader
lines.text: 2 gp and that's as low as I'll go.

lines.speaker: Silk trader
lines.text: I'm not selling it for any less. You'll probably go and sell it in Varrock for a profit, anyway.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh dear. I don't have enough money.

lines.speaker: Silk trader
lines.text: Well, come back when you do have some money!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, really. I don't want it.

lines.speaker: Silk trader
lines.text: Okay, but that's the best price you're going to get.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm in search of a man named Avan Fitzharmon.

lines.speaker: Silk trader
lines.text: Can't say as I've seen him... I'm sure if he's been to Al Kharid recently someone around here will have though.
